items.title: Kelly Olynyk's participation in the West finals has been limited to just 8 minutes of mop-up duty, but that doesn't mean he isn't continuing to play the game he loves.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Kelly Olynyk's participation in the West finals has been limited to just 8 minutes of mop-up duty, but that doesn't mean he isn't continuing to play the game he loves.

On the vet working overtime to help out Harrison Ingram and other young players:
www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Veteran Kelly Olynyk puts in extra one-on-one practice with Spurs' young players
media.description: The 13th-year big man regularly works out after practices and shootarounds with the two-way contract players like Harrison Ingram to help them hone their games.

items.title: Jared McCain has gotten touched up by Mason Plumlee and Bismack Biyombo. He's at the free throw line, so there's enough time to get hip checked by Kelly Olynyk
